CustomField.description: Select this option to restrict invoice creation for this account or contract. When enabled, users will not be able to generate invoices for associated contracts unless this setting is overridden at the contract level.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Select this option to restrict invoice creation for this account or contract. When enabled, users will not be able to generate invoices for associated contracts unless this setting is overridden at the contract level.
CustomField.label: Invoice Creation Restriction
